name: Giant Goat
special_abilities: [{"name":"Charge","desc":"If the goat moves at least 20 ft. straight toward a target and then hits it with a ram attack on the same turn, the target takes an extra 5 (2d4) bludgeoning damage. If the target is a creature, it must succeed on a DC 13 Strength saving throw or be knocked prone."},{"name":"Sure-Footed","desc":"The goat has advantage on Strength and Dexterity saving throws made against effects that would knock it prone."}]
actions: [{"name":"Ram","desc":"Melee Weapon Attack: +5 to hit, reach 5 ft., one target. Hit: 8 (2d4 + 3) bludgeoning damage.","attack_bonus":5,"damage_dice":"2d4+3"}]
